overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Gryffindor student walking through the castle interior, transitioning from the common room through stone corridors, a spiral staircase, and into a grand hall. The video features high-quality game engine graphics with warm lighting and gothic architecture.

events.description: approaching and entering the round stone doorway leading out of the common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the cozy common room past the fireplace toward the exit tunnel

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair near the bookcase

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and carved mantel
carved stone lion head above the fireplace
red and gold house banner hanging on the wall
tall wooden bookcase with glass doors containing books
large circular ornate rug covering the stone floor
circular stone archway leading to the exit tunnel

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the Gryffindor common room, featuring a warm fireplace, stone lion mantel, and red-gold tapestries. The character walks across a patterned rug toward a round stone doorway, passing a student sitting by the bookcase. The lighting is warm and mixed between firelight and window light.

events.description: entering the narrow stone tunnel from the common room
exiting the tunnel into the bright corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the confined stone tunnel connecting the common room to the main corridor

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone brick walls forming a narrow passage
wooden door at the end of the tunnel leading to the corridor

segments.scene_description: A brief transition through a narrow, dimly lit stone tunnel with rough walls. The character moves from the warm common room toward a wooden door at the far end, emerging into a brighter space.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with vaulted ceilings and tall windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long sunlit corridor passing students seated on benches and others walking

notable_agents.action: student with white hair sitting on wooden bench reading a book

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting
tall gothic windows allowing bright sunlight to stream in
long wooden bench against the wall
gold-framed portraits hanging on the wood-paneled walls
polished stone floor tiles reflecting the sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand gothic corridor with high vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows on the right side casting dramatic light patterns on the stone floor. Students sit on wooden benches along the walls, and framed portraits hang on the left. The atmosphere is bright and scholarly.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral stone staircase with narrow windows

events.description: beginning to ascend the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the winding stone staircase upward

entered.detail: worn stone steps spiraling upward in a tight curve
narrow gothic windows in the stone stairwell wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters and ascends a narrow spiral stone staircase with small windows letting in beams of light. The space is tight and enclosed, with worn stone steps curving upward to the next level.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with ornate wood paneling and marble floors

events.description: black cat walks across the marble floor in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall observing the architecture and other students

notable_agents.action: black cat walking across the marble floor toward the right side

entered.detail: massive ornate wooden archway with carved details leading deeper into the castle
intricately patterned marble floor with geometric designs
large decorative window above the archway with blue stained glass
dark wood paneled walls with decorative moldings
thick stone columns supporting the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast grand hall with ornate marble floors, massive wooden archways, and high ceilings supported by stone pillars. Sunlight streams through large windows, illuminating the dark wood paneling. Students gather in small groups conversing, and a black cat crosses the floor as the character explores the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cozy, firelit intimacy of the Gryffindor common room into the expansive, sun-drenched grandeur of a main castle hall. It begins by gliding across a patterned rug past a stone lion mantel and red-gold tapestries, moving through a round doorway and into a narrow, dimly lit stone tunnel. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the space opens into a bright gothic corridor where dramatic light patterns from arched windows fall across stone floors and scholarly students. The camera then tightens as it ascends a narrow spiral staircase with beams of light piercing through small windows, before finally breaking out into a vast hall of ornate marble and massive wooden archways. Sunlight streams through large windows to illuminate the dark wood paneling and gathering students as a black cat crosses the floor.
